description_long: This is a modern, rectangular filing cabinet constructed primarily from medium-toned wood with a natural grain pattern. The front features four wide, flat drawers with no visible handles, giving it a sleek, minimalist appearance. The cabinet stands on two black, V-shaped metal legs that elevate it slightly off the ground, adding a touch of industrial style. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain continuing seamlessly around the structure. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing office items or decor. There are no visible locks, label holders, or decorative elements, emphasizing its clean and functional design.
description: A modern wooden filing cabinet with four flat drawers and black metal legs, featuring a minimalist, handle-less design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four wide, flat drawers with no visible handles and black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden panel and the depth of the cabinet, with the black metal leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a seamless wooden back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain wooden panel and visible leg.
